calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Onboarding smoke test -- EWIN-PC (Eoin) [retry b]
items.notes: Re-run after GPU block hardening. Original V3-ONBOARD-smoke-EWIN-PC errored 2026-04-05 (exit code 1, 94.3s, no output file). Script now wraps Block 3 GPU in try/except (graceful fallback to CPU-only) and writes diagnostic error JSON on any crash.

items.title: MECH-120 SHY-Analog Normalisation Phase Ordering (SHY before vs after SWS)
items.note: Four conditions: WAKING_ONLY, SWS_NO_SHY, SHY_THEN_SWS (correct order), SWS_THEN_SHY (wrong order). Uses shy_normalise(decay=0.85) substrate addition. PASS: SHY_THEN_SWS has lower slot_cosine_sim than SWS_NO_SHY (S1) AND lower than SWS_THEN_SHY (S2) in >=2/3 seeds. Tests that SHY homeostasis before SWS is functionally necessary.

items.title: Onboarding smoke test -- ree-cloud-1 (Hetzner CX22)
items.notes: First-run pipeline verification for Hetzner CX22 cloud worker. CPU-only (no GPU). Tests env stepping + full training loop throughput. Will be claimed automatically when cloud worker comes online.

items.title: Q-034: Hazard/Resource Ratio Threshold Sweep (3x3 grid, HABIT vs PLANNED)
items.note: 3x3 hazard/resource sweep; finds threshold ratio above which PLANNED=HABIT (depression attractor). Parameter extension of EXQ-237a.

items.title: INV-053: Depression Attractor Replication (5-seed LONG_HORIZON, approach_rate metric)
items.note: Multi-seed replication of EXQ-237a depression attractor. Includes approach_rate metric (Treadway & Zald 2011 wanting/liking grounding). Must run before EXQ-251/252/253 rescue experiments.

items.title: INV-054: Phase-Transition Recovery (LONG_HORIZON -> LOW_HARM, terrain coverage tracking)
items.note: Phase-transition recovery test. PASS: recovery latency >50 Phase-2 episodes. Adds terrain_coverage_by_ep metric (INV-054 mechanism: re-exposure breaks attractor). STAR*D anchored.

items.title: MECH-186: VALENCE_WANTING Floor Clamp vs Baseline (LONG_HORIZON, 2-cond x 3-seed)
items.note: MECH-186: serotonergic terrain maintenance (valence_wanting_floor=0.05) prevents depression attractor. Run after V3-EXQ-249 confirms attractor is robust.

items.title: MECH-187: Bidirectional z_goal Seeding Gain (5-cond: x0.6/x0.2 suppression, x2.0/x5.0 elevation)
items.note: MECH-187 bidirectional prediction. Gain multipliers: x0.6/x0.2 suppression (SIMPLE), x2.0/x5.0 elevation (LONG_HORIZON). Empirical anchors from Korte et al. 2016 (5-HT1B NAc microdialysis). Run after V3-EXQ-249.

items.title: SD-018: Resource Proximity Supervision Validation
items.note: Critical unblocking experiment: tests whether aux resource proximity regression on z_world enables benefit_eval and goal-directed behavior. P0/P1/P2 phased training. WITH vs WITHOUT ablation pair.

items.title: MECH-112: Goal Lift Redesign (SD-018 fix)
items.note: SD-018 fix: use_resource_proximity_head=True so z_world encodes resource proximity. Original FAIL was substrate gap, not mechanism failure.

items.title: MECH-163: Dual System Discrimination (SD-018 fix)
items.note: SD-018 fix: resource proximity supervision. V3 full completion gate experiment. Original FAIL (PLANNED=HABIT) was z_world noise, not planning failure.

items.title: SD-012: Drive Weight Ablation (SD-018 fix)
items.note: SD-018 fix: resource proximity supervision. Original showed ~1% drive_weight effect because z_goal seeded from noise-level z_world.

items.title: MECH-188: z_goal PFC Injection (SD-018 fix)
items.note: SD-018 fix: resource proximity supervision. z_goal injection needs a gradient to produce behavioral difference.

items.title: INV-052: Single Mechanism Sufficiency (SD-018 fix)
items.note: SD-018 fix: resource proximity supervision. Tests joint necessity of all three serotonergic mechanisms.
